ComicTagger.name: ComicTagger
ComicTagger.description: ComicTagger allows tagging digital comic book files with metadata, supporting CBZ and CBR, using data sourced from online databases like Comic Vine. Batch processing, automatic issue matching, and a CLI that allows for scripting.

andrewnicolaou.BrewServicesMenubar.name: BrewServicesMenubar
andrewnicolaou.BrewServicesMenubar.description: An OS X menu item for starting and stopping homebrew services. Reads the `homebrew services` command, showing you the status of your services and allowing them to be started, stopped and restarted.

app.longplay.Longplay-Mac.name: Longplay
app.longplay.Longplay-Mac.description: A music player focused on albums, presenting your library as a beautiful grid of cover art for intentional, front-to-back listening.

app.soulver.appstore.mac.name: Soulver 3
app.soulver.appstore.mac.description: A smart calculator notepad that understands natural language math, making it easy to work through calculations with context.

biz.papercut.pcng.client.name: PaperCut MF
biz.papercut.pcng.client.description: An enterprise print management application that manages secure printing, print quotas, authentication, and communication with managed printers and print servers.

br.com.marcosatanaka.musicbox.name: MusicBox
br.com.marcosatanaka.musicbox.description: A music save-for-later app that lets you capture songs, albums, and playlists from any source to enjoy or explore later.

br.com.marcosatanaka.play.name: Play
br.com.marcosatanaka.play.description: A YouTube watch-later app that lets you save videos to a personal queue and watch them on your own schedule.

cc.anybox.Anybox.name: Anybox
cc.anybox.Anybox.description: A powerful bookmarking app for saving links, files, and notes with tagging, search, and reading list features.

ch.sudo.cyberduck.name: Cyberduck
ch.sudo.cyberduck.description: A file transfer application that allows users to connect to and manage files on FTP, SFTP, WebDAV, cloud storage, and other remote server services through a graphical interface.

co.eclecticlight.AppexIndexer.name: AppexIndexer
co.eclecticlight.AppexIndexer.description: AppexIndexer indexes app extensions (appex bundles) installed on the system, helping users discover and understand the various extensions provided by installed applications.

com.1password.1password.name: 1Password
com.1password.1password.description: 1Password is a password manager that securely stores and autofills passwords, credit cards, secure notes, and other sensitive information across websites and apps. It uses end-to-end encryption to protect stored data and syncs across devices.

com.1password.safari.name: 1Password for Safari
com.1password.safari.description: 1Password for Safari is a browser extension that integrates 1Password's password management functionality directly into Safari, allowing users to autofill saved logins, passwords, credit cards, and other credentials on websites. (It doesn’t require the desktop app to be installed; it can sync directly to a 1Password account.)

com.ACDSystems.ACDSeePhotoStudio10.name: ACDSee Photo Studio 10
com.ACDSystems.ACDSeePhotoStudio10.description: ACDSee Photo Studio is a comprehensive photo management and editing application for macOS that allows users to organize, browse, and edit their photo libraries. It offers tools for non-destructive editing, RAW processing, and asset management for photographers of all skill levels.

com.LittleFin.Chronicle-Touch.name: Chronicle
com.LittleFin.Chronicle-Touch.description: Chronicle is a bill and subscription tracking app. Track payment due dates, monitor their monthly expenses, avoid late payments.

com.acdsystems.acdseePhotoFlash.name: ACDSee Photo Flash
com.acdsystems.acdseePhotoFlash.description: Minimalist app for brightening underexposed photos using ACDSee’s “Lighting and Contrast Enhancement (LCE)” technology to avoid excessive grain and blowout. (Discontinued; replaced with Light EQ by ACDSee.)

com.adobe.adobedigitaleditions.app.name: Adobe Digital Editions
com.adobe.adobedigitaleditions.app.description: Adobe Digital Editions is an e-book reader and library manager for DRM-protected EPUB books.

com.agiletortoise.Drafts-OSX.name: Drafts
com.agiletortoise.Drafts-OSX.description: A quick-capture writing app where text starts here — capture ideas fast and then send them anywhere with powerful actions.

com.ahoylabs.faraday.name: Backyard AI
com.ahoylabs.faraday.description: Backyard AI allows users to run and chat with LLMs and characters locally on their device. [Deprecated as of June 2025, there will be no more updates to the desktop app.]

com.amazon.Lassen.name: Amazon Kindle
com.amazon.Lassen.description: Amazon Kindle for macOS is an e-reader app that allows users to read books, magazines, and other publications purchased from Amazon's Kindle store. The app syncs reading progress across devices and provides features like adjustable fonts, bookmarks, and highlighting.

com.ameba.SwiftBar.name: SwiftBar
com.ameba.SwiftBar.description: A menu bar app that runs any script or executable and displays its output, making it easy to build custom menu bar plugins.

com.anthropic.claudefordesktop.name: Claude
com.anthropic.claudefordesktop.description: Anthropic's AI assistant desktop app, offering thoughtful conversation, writing help, coding support, and in-depth analysis.

com.apimac.CleanText.name: Clean Text
com.apimac.CleanText.description: Clean Text cleans and transforms text from the clipboard, removing unwanted formatting, fixing spacing and line breaks, converting text case, and more. It streamlines pasting plain, properly formatted text into other applications. It also offers tools for transforming text like regular expressions, Unicode 𝓯𝓪𝓷𝓬𝔂 𝖙𝖊𝖝𝖙, converting quote mark types (like curly quotes), or applying AI text suggestions.

com.apphousekitchen.aldente-pro.name: AlDente
com.apphousekitchen.aldente-pro.description: AlDente is a macOS app that helps preserve battery health by limiting the maximum charge level of your Mac's battery to a user-defined threshold. It allows you to set charging caps and manage power settings to extend your MacBook's battery lifespan.

com.apple.Aperture3.name: Aperture
com.apple.Aperture3.description: Aperture was a professional photo management and editing application developed by Apple, allowing photographers to import, organize, edit, and export large libraries of images with advanced tools for color correction, retouching, and metadata management. Apple discontinued the app in 2014.

com.apple.SFSymbols.name: SF Symbols
com.apple.SFSymbols.description: Apple's browser and reference tool for the SF Symbols icon library, used by developers to find and export symbols for their apps.

com.apple.Safari.name: Safari
com.apple.Safari.description: Apple's built-in web browser with privacy-focused features, fast performance, and tight integration across Apple devices.

com.apple.dt.Xcode.name: Xcode
com.apple.dt.Xcode.description: Apple's integrated development environment for building apps for iOS, macOS, watchOS, tvOS, and visionOS with Swift and Objective-C.

com.apple.iMovieApp.name: iMovie
com.apple.iMovieApp.description: Apple's free video editing app for creating movies and trailers with a simple timeline, transitions, and effects.

com.apple.iWork.Keynote.name: Keynote
com.apple.iWork.Keynote.description: Apple's presentation software with stunning templates, cinematic transitions, and real-time collaboration.

com.apple.iWork.Numbers.name: Numbers
com.apple.iWork.Numbers.description: Apple's spreadsheet app with flexible canvas layouts, powerful formulas, and beautiful charts.

com.apple.iWork.Pages.name: Pages
com.apple.iWork.Pages.description: Apple's word processor with rich templates, real-time collaboration, and seamless export to Word and PDF.

com.appliedphasor.secure-shellfish.name: ShellFish
com.appliedphasor.secure-shellfish.description: A full-featured SSH client and SFTP file manager for Mac and iOS, with key authentication and a built-in terminal.

com.appzapper.appzapper2.name: AppZapper
com.appzapper.appzapper2.description: Uninstaller utility that removes applications along with their associated files, such as preferences, caches, and support files, ensuring a clean uninstall rather than simply dragging apps to the Trash.

com.asiafu.Bloom.name: Bloom
com.asiafu.Bloom.description: Bloom is a file manager intended to replace Finder with a more refined experience. Features include multi-pane layouts, a refined search experience, and a compact mode for working side-by-side with other applications.

com.backblaze.Backblaze.name: Backblaze
com.backblaze.Backblaze.description: Client for the Backblaze cloud backup service, which provides unlimited secure storage for personal computer backups.

com.backblaze.BackblazeRestore.name: BackblazeRestore
com.backblaze.BackblazeRestore.description: A utility to download and restore files backed up to a Backblaze cloud backup account. For large restores, this can be faster and more reliable than downloading from the Web interface, including resuming interrupted downloads.

com.barebones.bbedit.name: BBEdit
com.barebones.bbedit.description: A professional text editor for macOS with powerful search, syntax highlighting, and scripting for developers and writers alike.

com.binarynights.ForkLift.name: ForkLift
com.binarynights.ForkLift.description: A dual-pane file manager with built-in FTP, SFTP, S3, and WebDAV support, plus syncing, archiving, and remote editing.

com.bitbq.Changes.name: Changes
com.bitbq.Changes.description: Changes is a diff and merge tool for macOS that allows developers to compare files and folders side by side, highlighting differences and enabling easy merging of changes between versions. [Appears abandoned, last update Nov. 22, 2017.]

com.blitterstudio.Amiberry.name: Amiberry
com.blitterstudio.Amiberry.description: Amiga emulator, built on WinUAE, runs software and games designed for Commodore Amiga computers. It supports a wide range of Amiga hardware targets, and has modern features like drag-and-drop, shaders, RetroArch controller mapping, and custom bezels.

com.brainfevermedia.anamorphicpro.name: Anamorphic Pro
com.brainfevermedia.anamorphicpro.description: Anamorphic Pro is a macOS app that allows users to create anamorphic lens effects and cinematic looks on images and video footage. It provides tools to simulate the characteristic visual qualities of anamorphic cinematography, including lens flares, bokeh, and aspect ratio adjustments.

com.brettterpstra.marked2.name: Marked 2
com.brettterpstra.marked2.description: A Markdown preview app that works alongside any editor, rendering documents in real time with custom styles and export options.

com.byteproject.Ascension.name: Ascension
com.byteproject.Ascension.description: Ascension is a macOS utility that allows users to manage and switch between different versions of Xcode installed on their system, making it easy to set the active developer tools path.

com.canva.affinity.name: Affinity
com.canva.affinity.description: Professional-class design, photo editing and page layout software.

com.cardinal.one.name: Cardinal
com.cardinal.one.description: Cardinal is a file search app, meant to be extremely fast at searching by file name, with an interface and syntax inspired by the Windows file search app Everything.

com.cascadea.app.name: Cascadea
com.cascadea.app.description: A Safari extension and compantion app that allows users and developers to customize website appearance and behavior using custom CSS themes, UserCSS styles, and built-in style editing tools.

com.chabomakers.Antinote.name: Antinote
com.chabomakers.Antinote.description: A minimal, distraction-free note-taking app that lives in your menu bar for quick capture.

com.charliemchapman.ScreenFrames.name: Framous
com.charliemchapman.ScreenFrames.description: Wraps screenshots and screen recordings in device frames for clean app previews and marketing material.

com.charliemchapman.dark-noise.name: Dark Noise
com.charliemchapman.dark-noise.description: An ambient sound app with dozens of high-quality sounds and mixes for focus, sleep, or relaxation.

com.coconut-flavour.coconutBattery.name: coconutBattery
com.coconut-flavour.coconutBattery.description: coconutBattery displays live information about the health, age and status of the battery in your Mac or a connected iPhone or iPad.

com.codeweavers.CrossOver.name: CrossOver
com.codeweavers.CrossOver.description: CrossOver is a distribution and front-end for Wine that lets Windows applications and games run without an emulator, translating Windows commands and function calls for seamless integration and native-like performance.

com.culturedcode.ThingsMac.name: Things 3
com.culturedcode.ThingsMac.description: An award-winning personal task manager with a clean, delightful design for capturing, organizing, and completing your to-dos.

com.daisydiskapp.DaisyDisk.name: DaisyDisk
com.daisydiskapp.DaisyDisk.description: A visual disk space analyzer that shows your drive as an interactive sunburst map, making it easy to find and reclaim space.

com.disc-soft.DAEMONToolsLite.name: DAEMON Tools
com.disc-soft.DAEMONToolsLite.description: DAEMON Tools is a disk mounting utility that primarily allows users to create virtual drives and mount image files such as ISO, MDF, and other disc formats. It can also create disk images from physical discs or files on your computer. Depending on purchased features, it can also create bootable USB devices, act as an iSCSI initiator, and burn discs.

com.docker.docker.name: Docker
com.docker.docker.description: A platform for building, running, and sharing containerized applications on your Mac via a friendly desktop interface.

com.dwarvesv.minimalbar.name: Hidden Bar
com.dwarvesv.minimalbar.description: Hidden Bar is a macOS utility that allows users to hide and organize menu bar icons to reduce clutter and improve screen space. It lets you selectively show or hide menu bar items with a simple click, keeping your menu bar clean while maintaining quick access to important applications.

com.edovia.screens.5.name: Screens 5
com.edovia.screens.5.description: A VNC and remote desktop client for controlling other Macs and computers from your Mac with a smooth, native interface.

com.electron.asana.name: Asana
com.electron.asana.description: Asana is a project management and team collaboration app that allows users to organize tasks, track project progress, and coordinate work across teams. It provides tools for creating task lists, setting deadlines, assigning responsibilities, and communicating within projects.

com.ethanbills.DockDoor.name: DockDoor
com.ethanbills.DockDoor.description: Adds window previews to your Mac Dock on hover, so you can see and switch between open windows of each app at a glance.

com.flexibits.cardhop.mac.name: Cardhop
com.flexibits.cardhop.mac.description: A contacts app with a natural language input bar, making it fast to add, edit, and interact with people in your address book.

com.flexibits.fantastical2.mac.name: Fantastical
com.flexibits.fantastical2.mac.description: A calendar and task manager with natural language event creation, beautiful views, and deep integration with Apple's ecosystem.

com.flyingmeat.Acorn8.name: Acorn
com.flyingmeat.Acorn8.description: A full-featured image editor designed for Mac with layers, filters, and non-destructive editing.

com.github.GitHubClient.name: GitHub Desktop
com.github.GitHubClient.description: GitHub's official desktop client for managing repositories, pull requests, and branches with a visual interface.

com.glouel.AerialUpdater.name: Aerial Companion
com.glouel.AerialUpdater.description: Aerial Companion is a helper app that manages updates and installation of the Aerial screensaver, which displays Apple TV aerial video screensavers (as well as third-party video screen savers) on Mac computers.

com.google.Chrome.name: Google Chrome
com.google.Chrome.description: Google's fast, cross-platform web browser with a vast extension library and deep Google service integration.

com.google.android.mtpviewer.name: Android File Transfer
com.google.android.mtpviewer.description: Android File Transfer enables users to browse and transfer files between a Mac and an Android device connected via USB. It uses the Media Transfer Protocol (MTP) to provide access to the Android device's storage. (Discontinued.)

com.googlecode.iterm2.name: iTerm2
com.googlecode.iterm2.description: Terminal emulator offering advanced capabilities such as split panes, search, autocomplete, tmux integration, inline images, automatic profile switching, instant replay, and extensive customization options.

com.hnc.Discord.name: Discord
com.hnc.Discord.description: A voice, video, and text communication platform popular with gaming, developer, and hobby communities.

com.iconfactory.Tot.name: Tot
com.iconfactory.Tot.description: A tiny text scratchpad that lives in your menu bar, offering seven color-coded slots for notes, snippets, and quick drafts.

com.if.Amphetamine.name: Amphetamine
com.if.Amphetamine.description: Keeps your Mac awake on demand, preventing sleep during downloads, presentations, or long tasks.

com.johnhaney.mac.Backdrop.name: Backdrop
com.johnhaney.mac.Backdrop.description: Backdrop is a utility that places a solid color or chosen background behind a specific app window, temporarily hiding your desktop and other background elements. This is useful to focus attention during screen sharing, presentations, or recordings.

com.junecloud.Deliveries.name: Deliveries
com.junecloud.Deliveries.description: A package tracking app that monitors shipments from all major carriers and notifies you of delivery updates.

com.kapeli.dashdoc.name: Dash
com.kapeli.dashdoc.description: Dash is an API documentation browser and code snippet manager that provides offline access to over 200 documentation sets for various programming languages, frameworks, and tools.

com.katsurashareware.AmorphousDiskMark.name: AmorphousDiskMark
com.katsurashareware.AmorphousDiskMark.description: AmorphousDiskMark measures storage read/write performance in MB/s and IOPS. It is inspired by the Windows application CrystalDiskMark and uses a very similar UI, with permission from the CrystalDiskMark author.

com.khanov.BlockerX.name: 1Blocker
com.khanov.BlockerX.description: 1Blocker is a content blocker and privacy app for Safari that filters ads, trackers, and malicious websites to improve browsing speed and protect user privacy. It also includes features for managing cookies, blocking scripts, and customizing filtering rules.

com.kiwifruitware.Burn.name: Burn
com.kiwifruitware.Burn.description: Burn is a free disc burning application that allows users to create and burn audio, data, video, and MP3 CDs and DVDs. It supports various disc formats and provides a straightforward interface for writing files to optical media.

com.kruegersystems.calca.mac.name: Calca
com.kruegersystems.calca.mac.description: A symbolic calculator that lets you write math expressions and see live results inline, like a scratchpad for calculations.

com.macroplant.adapter.name: Adapter
com.macroplant.adapter.description: Adapter is a free video, audio, and image conversion application for macOS that allows users to convert media files between various formats with batch processing capabilities.

com.mactrackerapp.Mactracker.name: Mactracker
com.mactrackerapp.Mactracker.description: A reference application that provides detailed technical specifications, release information, software support data, and historical information for Apple hardware, software, and accessories.

com.manytricks.NameMangler.name: Name Mangler
com.manytricks.NameMangler.description: A batch file renamer with a live preview, supporting pattern matching, sequences, metadata insertion, and complex rename chains.

com.marcoarment.instapaperpro.name: Instapaper
com.marcoarment.instapaperpro.description: A read-later service that saves articles in a clean, distraction-free format for reading offline or at your own pace.

com.metaclassy.byword.name: Byword
com.metaclassy.byword.description: Byword is a minimalist, Markdown-focused text editor, offering a clean, distraction-free interface with support for exporting and publishing to platforms like WordPress, Medium, and Tumblr.

com.microsoft.Excel.name: Microsoft Excel
com.microsoft.Excel.description: A spreadsheet application used to organize, calculate, analyze, and visualize data using formulas, charts, tables, and automation tools.

com.microsoft.Outlook.name: Microsoft Outlook
com.microsoft.Outlook.description: An email and calendar application used to manage email, contacts, calendars, tasks, and meeting scheduling within personal and organizational environments.

com.microsoft.Powerpoint.name: Microsoft PowerPoint
com.microsoft.Powerpoint.description: A presentation application used to create and deliver slide-based presentations with text, images, charts, video, animations, and speaker notes.

com.microsoft.VSCode.name: Code
com.microsoft.VSCode.description: Free, open-source code editor that supports syntax highlighting, intelligent code completion, debugging, and version control integration across a wide range of programming languages and frameworks; with a thriving extension ecosystem.

com.microsoft.Word.name: Microsoft Word
com.microsoft.Word.description: A word processing application used to create, edit, format, and collaborate on documents such as letters, reports, forms, and other text-based content.

com.microsoft.onenote.mac.name: Microsoft OneNote
com.microsoft.onenote.mac.description: A digital note-taking application used to create, organize, and synchronize notebooks containing text, drawings, images, audio recordings, and other reference material across devices.

com.microsoft.teams2.name: Microsoft Teams
com.microsoft.teams2.description: A collaboration and communication platform that provides chat, video meetings, calling, file sharing, and integration with Microsoft 365 services for teams and organizations.

com.mimestream.Mimestream.name: Mimestream
com.mimestream.Mimestream.description: A native Gmail client for Mac built with SwiftUI, offering a fast, beautiful email experience with full Google account integration.

com.mothersruin.Apparency.name: Apparency
com.mothersruin.Apparency.description: Inspect macOS applications, revealing code signatures, entitlements, version information, and other metadata about applications and their contents. See identifiers and versions, what document types and URLs an application supports, and what platforms it’s compiled for.
com.mothersruin.Apparency.developer: Randy Saldinger, dba Mothers Ruin Software

com.ngocluu.goodlinks.name: GoodLinks
com.ngocluu.goodlinks.description: A clean read-later app for saving links with tagging, full-text search, and an integrated reader view.

com.nick.Clic.name: Clic
com.nick.Clic.description: An alternate way to control your Sonos system, with widgets and more.

com.noodlesoft.Hazel.name: Hazel
com.noodlesoft.Hazel.description: An automated file organizer that watches folders and applies rules to sort, rename, tag, or delete files automatically.

com.objective-see.blockblock.helper.name: BlockBlock Helper
com.objective-see.blockblock.helper.description: BlockBlock Helper is a privileged helper tool for the BlockBlock security application that monitors and detects persistent component installations on macOS. It runs with elevated privileges to watch for software attempting to establish persistence mechanisms, such as launch agents, daemons, or login items.

com.okta.mobile.name: Okta Verify
com.okta.mobile.description: A multi-factor authentication application that provides secure sign-in verification using push notifications, one-time passcodes, and device-based authentication for organizational accounts and services.

com.openai.atlas.name: ChatGPT Atlas
com.openai.atlas.description: Chromium-based Web browser by OpenAI with ChatGPT built in, offering a chat sidebar, agent mode, and integration with your ChatGPT history.

com.openai.chat.name: ChatGPT
com.openai.chat.description: OpenAI's desktop app for conversational AI, offering current GPT models for answering questions, writing, coding, and analysis.

com.openai.codex.name: Codex
com.openai.codex.description: OpenAI's coding assistant that helps developers write, debug, and understand code across multiple languages.

com.panic.CandyBar3.name: CandyBar
com.panic.CandyBar3.description: CandyBar was an icon management tool. In its heyday it was a customization tool: every system icon on your Mac could be changed. CandyBar 3 combined with the icon library tool Pixadex, providing library features, like Apple’s Photos app, for managing a library of icons. Although CandyBar was mostly discontinued in 2012, the icon library features continue to be useful, and the CandyBar Sugar Free Edition from 2022 brings it into the Apple Silicon era, albeit completely unsupported and with some bugs.

com.panic.transmit.mas.name: Transmit
com.panic.transmit.mas.description: A professional file transfer app for Mac supporting FTP, SFTP, S3, WebDAV, and many cloud services with a dual-pane interface.

com.phocusllp.duemac.name: Due
com.phocusllp.duemac.description: A reminders app that nags you until things are done, with natural language input and persistent alerts that don't let you forget.

com.pixelmatorteam.pixelmator.x.name: Pixelmator Pro
com.pixelmatorteam.pixelmator.x.description: A professional photo editor and image design app for Mac with AI-powered tools, layers, and full RAW support.

com.ranchero.NetNewsWire-Evergreen.name: NetNewsWire
com.ranchero.NetNewsWire-Evergreen.description: A free, open-source RSS reader for Mac and iOS with iCloud sync and a clean, native reading experience.

com.raycast.macos.name: Raycast
com.raycast.macos.description: A blazing-fast launcher and productivity tool for Mac with extensions for almost everything — search, snippets, scripts, and AI.

com.replay.sleeve.name: Sleeve
com.replay.sleeve.description: A floating album art display for your desktop that shows the current track from Spotify or Apple Music in a stylish overlay.

com.rileytestut.AltServer.name: AltServer
com.rileytestut.AltServer.description: Application to install and refresh AltStore (an alternative iOS app marketplace) on iPhone or iPad, by signing apps with an Apple ID over a local network or USB connection.

com.rogueamoeba.audiohijack.name: Audio Hijack
com.rogueamoeba.audiohijack.description: Audio Hijack is a professional audio recording and routing application for macOS that allows users to capture audio from any application or source on their computer. It enables mixing, effects processing, and high-quality recording of audio streams that would normally be difficult or impossible to record directly.

com.rogueamoeba.farrago.name: Farrago
com.rogueamoeba.farrago.description: A soundboard app for Mac that lets you organize and trigger audio clips instantly — great for podcasters, streamers, and presenters.

com.runningwithcrayons.Alfred.name: Alfred
com.runningwithcrayons.Alfred.description: Alfred is a productivity application that serves as a powerful alternative to Spotlight, offering fast file search, application launching, and custom workflows to automate tasks on macOS. It enables users to access files, execute commands, and control their Mac through a keyboard-driven interface with customizable hotkeys and advanced features like clipboard history and snippets.

com.sheepsystems.BookMacster.name: BookMacster
com.sheepsystems.BookMacster.description: BookMacster manages and syncs bookmarks across multiple web browsers, allowing users to maintain a unified bookmark library that can be shared or distributed to different browsers on one or more Macs.

com.sindresorhus.Actions.name: Actions
com.sindresorhus.Actions.description: Actions provides a large collection of additional actions for the Shortcuts app, extending its automation capabilities with functions not available by default. They cover a wide range including text transformations, parsing CSV, JSON and Markdown, storing values in the Keychain, checking Dark mode… 180+ total.

com.sindresorhus.Pure-Paste.name: Pure Paste
com.sindresorhus.Pure-Paste.description: A lightweight clipboard utility that automatically removes formatting from copied text so pasted content matches the style of the destination application.

com.sindresorhus.Supercharge.name: Supercharge
com.sindresorhus.Supercharge.description: A collection of small Mac utilities and enhancements packed into one app — window management, system tweaks, and productivity boosts.

com.splasm.audiobookbuilder2.name: Audiobook Builder
com.splasm.audiobookbuilder2.description: Converts audio CDs or audio files into Apple-style m4b audiobooks. Join audio, create chapter stops with names and artwork, encode in AAC or HE-AAC, and output to Books, Music or iTunes.

com.squirrels.AirParrot-3.name: AirParrot 3
com.squirrels.AirParrot-3.description: AirParrot allows users to wirelessly stream or mirror their screen, audio, and media files to devices such as Apple TV, Chromecast, and AirPlay receivers. It extends macOS's native AirPlay functionality by adding support for additional streaming targets; and extra features such as streaming a single application instead of the whole screen, or transcoding video so you can stream almost anything, regardless of the receiving device’s compatibility.

com.stairways.keyboardmaestro.editor.name: Keyboard Maestro
com.stairways.keyboardmaestro.editor.description: A powerful macro and automation tool for macOS that can automate virtually anything — keystrokes, menus, scripts, and more.

com.stonerl.Thaw.name: Thaw
com.stonerl.Thaw.description: Menu bar management tool. Its primary function is hiding and showing menu bar items; it can also customize the menu bar’s appearance. Extremely useful when running many menu bar items and facing clutter or running out of space.

com.tapbots.Ivory.name: Ivory
com.tapbots.Ivory.description: A polished Mastodon client from the creators of Tweetbot, with a beautiful timeline and support for multiple accounts.

com.tapbots.Pastebot2Mac.name: Pastebot
com.tapbots.Pastebot2Mac.description: A clipboard manager with filters, transformations, and syncing, letting you search and reuse anything you've ever copied.

com.tinyspeck.slackmacgap.name: Slack
com.tinyspeck.slackmacgap.description: A team communication platform with channels, direct messages, file sharing, and integrations for workplace collaboration.
com.tinyspeck.slackmacgap.developer: Slack Technologies LLC, a Salesforce company

com.todesktop.230313mzl4w4u92.name: Cursor
com.todesktop.230313mzl4w4u92.description: An AI-powered code editor built on Visual Studio Code that assists developers with code generation, editing, debugging, and project navigation using integrated artificial intelligence tools.

com.todoist.mac.Todoist.name: Todoist
com.todoist.mac.Todoist.description: A cross-platform task manager with natural language input, projects, priorities, and collaboration features for teams and individuals.

com.tommertron.macAppLibrary.name: macAppLibrary
com.tommertron.macAppLibrary.description: A native Mac app that catalogs your installed applications, augments them with community-sourced metadata, and exposes the library to AI tools via a built-in MCP server.

com.tupil.beamer.name: Beamer
com.tupil.beamer.description: Beamer streams video and audio files from your Mac directly to an Apple TV or Chromecast, allowing you to play local media on your television without needing to transfer files or use iTunes.

com.valerijs.boguckis.store.TextSniper.name: TextSniper
com.valerijs.boguckis.store.TextSniper.description: Captures text from anywhere on your screen using OCR — grab text from images, PDFs, videos, or anything you can see.

com.valvesoftware.steam.name: Steam
com.valvesoftware.steam.description: Cross platform, games-focused digital distribution platform and storefront that allows users to purchase, download, and launch video games and software. It provides social features, cloud saves, and automatic updates for installed titles.

com.wikibuy.mac-app.name: Capital One Shopping
com.wikibuy.mac-app.description: Capital One Shopping is a browser extension companion app. The extension finds and applies coupon codes and compares prices across retailers while you shop online. [Formerly Wikibuy.]

company.thebrowser.Browser.name: Arc
company.thebrowser.Browser.description: Arc is a web browser developed by The Browser Company that reimagines browser design with features like split view browsing, customizable spaces for organizing tabs, and AI-powered tools to enhance web browsing productivity. It offers a modern alternative to traditional browsers with a focus on user control and efficient tab and window management.

de.icab.iCab.name: iCab
de.icab.iCab.description: A lightweight web browser that provides tabbed browsing, privacy controls, filtering tools, download management, and extensive customization options for advanced users.

dev.leitmotif.taska.name: Taska
dev.leitmotif.taska.description: A GitHub Issues and project management client for Mac, giving developers a native interface for tracking and managing tasks.

dev.zed.Zed.name: Zed
dev.zed.Zed.description: A high-performance, collaborative code editor built in Rust with GPU rendering, real-time collaboration, and AI integration.

dk.simonbs.DataJar.name: Data Jar
dk.simonbs.DataJar.description: A structured data store for shortcuts and automation, letting you persist and access data across automations and apps.

edu.umich.mprint.mprint-installer.name: mprint_installer
edu.umich.mprint.mprint-installer.description: A University of Michigan utility that installs and configures MPrint campus printers, queues, and printing support software on macOS systems.

io.balena.etcher.name: balenaEtcher
io.balena.etcher.description: balenaEtcher is a tool for writing OS images, such as Linux distributions or embedded system firmware, to SD cards and USB drives. It is meant to be simple for end users, extensible for developers, and work on any platform.

io.raindrop.macapp.name: Raindrop.io
io.raindrop.macapp.description: A cross-platform bookmarking manager with collections, tags, full-text search, and a browser extension for saving anything from the web.

io.tailscale.ipn.macos.name: Tailscale
io.tailscale.ipn.macos.description: A zero-config VPN built on WireGuard that connects your devices in a private mesh network for secure remote access.

md.obsidian.Obsidian-Web-Clipper.name: Obsidian Web Clipper
md.obsidian.Obsidian-Web-Clipper.description: A browser extension for clipping web content directly into your Obsidian vault with formatting and metadata preserved.

md.obsidian.name: Obsidian
md.obsidian.description: A powerful knowledge base and note-taking app that works on local Markdown files with bidirectional linking and a plugin ecosystem.

me.damir.dropover-mac.name: Dropover
me.damir.dropover-mac.description: Dropover is a macOS utility that allows users to temporarily hold and manage multiple files and folders in a floating shelf for easy drag-and-drop operations between applications. It streamlines workflows by providing quick access to frequently used items without cluttering the desktop.

net.battle.app.name: Battle.net
net.battle.app.description: Desktop client for Blizzard/Activision games, such as World of Warcraft, Overwatch 2, Diablo IV, and Hearthstone. It manages game installation and updates, friends lists, and in-game purchases across Blizzard's titles, as well as some additional Xbox Game Studios titles like Call of Duty Modern Warfare, Black Ops, Sea of Thieves, and Avowed.

net.kovidgoyal.calibre.name: calibre
net.kovidgoyal.calibre.description: Calibre is a comprehensive e-book manager that allows users to organize, convert, edit, and transfer e-books across various formats and devices. It includes a built-in e-book viewer and supports downloading news from the web as e-books. It has a deeply customizable database and interface, and is open source.

net.publicspace.Boring-Old-Menu-Bar.name: Boring Old Menu Bar
net.publicspace.Boring-Old-Menu-Bar.description: Boring Old Menu Bar restores the Catalina-style menu bar appearance, without transparency. It also adds some additional color options, and support for rounded corners.

net.publicspace.abfa7.name: A Better Finder Attributes 7
net.publicspace.abfa7.description: A Better Finder Attributes is a macOS utility that allows users to batch edit file metadata, including creation and modification dates, EXIF & IPTC data in photos, and file flags. It also has tools for working with invisible files. It integrates with the Finder as a contextual menu plugin for quick access.

net.publicspace.abfr12.name: A Better Finder Rename 12
net.publicspace.abfr12.description: A powerful batch file renaming utility with dozens of renaming methods, previews, and automation support.

net.shinyfrog.bear.name: Bear
net.shinyfrog.bear.description: A beautiful writing app for crafting notes and prose, with Markdown support, tagging, and seamless sync across Apple devices.

net.shinystone.OKJSON.name: OK JSON
net.shinystone.OKJSON.description: A JSON viewer and formatter that integrates with browsers to display JSON responses in a readable, collapsible tree format.

nl.jeffreykuiken.NoirApp.mac.name: Noir
nl.jeffreykuiken.NoirApp.mac.description: Automatically adds dark mode to websites in Safari that don't natively support it, reducing eye strain at night.

org.adblockplus.adblockplussafarimac.name: Adblock Plus
org.adblockplus.adblockplussafarimac.description: Adblock Plus for Safari is a macOS extension that blocks advertisements on websites by filtering ad content as you browse. It helps reduce visual clutter and can improve page load times by preventing ads from loading in Safari.

org.aseprite.Aseprite.name: Aseprite
org.aseprite.Aseprite.description: Aseprite is a pixel art editor for creating sprites, tilesets, and pixel-based animations. It offers frame-by-frame animation support, layering, and drawing tools tailored specifically for pixel art workflows.

org.audacityteam.audacity.name: Audacity
org.audacityteam.audacity.description: A free, open-source audio editor and recorder for multi-track editing, mixing, and effects processing.

org.blenderfoundation.blender.name: Blender
org.blenderfoundation.blender.description: Blender is a free and open-source 3D creation suite that supports the full pipeline of modeling, rigging, animation, simulation, rendering, compositing, and motion tracking. It also includes a video editor and features for editing game assets.

org.chiaki.chiaki.name: Chiaki
org.chiaki.chiaki.description: Chiaki is a free and open-source client for PlayStation Remote Play, allowing users to stream and play PlayStation 4 and PlayStation 5 games on their Mac over a local network or the internet.

org.cogx.cog.name: Cog
org.cogx.cog.description: Cog is a free, open-source audio player that supports a wide variety of audio formats, including FLAC, MP3, Ogg Vorbis, Windows Media Audio, ATRAC3, Monkey’s Audio (APE), RealAudio, MIDI, SID, dozens of tracker formats, game formats like GBS, NSF, VGM, and many others. It provides a clean, minimal interface for music playback with support for playlists and audio format plugins. It support gapless playback and last.fm scrobbling.
org.cogx.cog.developer: Christopher Snowhill, Vincent Spader, et al

org.jwz.cyberizer.name: Cyberizer
org.jwz.cyberizer.description: jwz’s utility for creating fun glitchy video collages

org.m0k.transmission.name: Transmission
org.m0k.transmission.description: A lightweight, open-source BitTorrent client for Mac with a minimal interface and low resource usage.

org.mozilla.firefox.name: Firefox
org.mozilla.firefox.description: A popular web browser that provides standards-based internet browsing with support for extensions, privacy protections, tabbed browsing, and cross-platform synchronization.

org.streetpea.chiaking.name: chiaki-ng
org.streetpea.chiaking.description: Chiaki-ng is an open-source client for PlayStation Remote Play, allowing users to stream and play PlayStation 4 and PlayStation 5 games on their Mac over a local network or the internet. Based on the original Chiaki, chiaki-ng is meant to be a faster moving and more community oriented project.

org.tempel.findanyfile.name: Find Any File
org.tempel.findanyfile.description: A powerful file search tool that goes beyond Spotlight, searching by name, type, date, or content even in system and hidden folders.

org.videolan.vlc.name: VLC
org.videolan.vlc.description: A free, open-source media player that plays virtually any video or audio format without additional codecs.

org.whispersystems.signal-desktop.name: Signal
org.whispersystems.signal-desktop.description: A privacy-focused encrypted messaging app for text, voice, and video calls with no ads and no data collection.

pl.micropixels.NepTunes.name: NepTunes
pl.micropixels.NepTunes.description: A menu bar music controller for Spotify and Apple Music, showing now-playing info and allowing playback control without switching apps.

pro.writer.mac.name: iA Writer
pro.writer.mac.description: A focused writing app with a minimal interface, Markdown support, and a distraction-free writing environment for long-form content.

recipes.mela.appkit.name: Mela
recipes.mela.appkit.description: A recipe manager for collecting, organizing, and cooking from recipes, with import from the web and meal planning features.

se.oblador.Hush.name: Hush
se.oblador.Hush.description: A Safari content blocker that silences cookie consent notices and privacy popups, giving you a cleaner browsing experience.

sh.cider.genten.mac.name: Cider
sh.cider.genten.mac.description: Cider is a third-party Apple Music client that provides an alternative interface for streaming and managing your library. Features include Chromecast support, visual customization, custom themes and plugins, last.fm and Discord integration.

us.zoom.xos.name: Zoom
us.zoom.xos.description: A video conferencing platform for meetings, webinars, and collaboration with screen sharing and recording features.

zzada.Brewlet.name: Brewlet
zzada.Brewlet.description: Brewlet provides a menu bar interface for managing Homebrew packages, allowing users to check for and install updates directly from the menu.
